utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all of these six items. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) property – includes type, bedrooms, price, currency, and even a note on suitability for remote work ⇒ fully specified. (2) financing – includes type, down payment %, amount, interest rate, term, documentation list, and some process notes ⇒ fully specified. (3) legal_services – includes service name, cost, currency, and some notes ⇒ fully specified. (4) moving_services – includes service level, cost, currency, and packing/unpacking details ⇒ fully specified. (5) setup_services – includes utilities package, cost, currency, and included services ⇒ fully specified. (6) total_budget – includes full cost breakdown with property price, down payment, legal fees, survey fees, moving and utility costs, total, and currency ⇒ fully specified. All six required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a townhouse priced at CAD 750,000. In the ground-truth purchase properties, the only property that matches this price is the 'Historic Townhouse' rated 6. For financing, the assistant used a 'Mortgage' with 20% down payment and 5% interest; this aligns most closely with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option, rated 9. For legal services, the assistant chose 'service_option31' costing CAD 800, which corresponds to the 'Basic Legal Package' (price CAD 800, rating 8). The property survey fee was CAD 650, which matches the 'Full Structural Survey' (price CAD 650, rating 9). The moving service was 'standard' with cost CAD 650, matching 'Standard Moving' (price CAD 650, rating 8). The setup services cost CAD 400 and included both basic utilities and premium internet/phone, which best matches the 'Business Setup' utilities package (price CAD 450, rating 7).
